title: New Republic Galactic Database
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] database|[[New Republic Centralized Archives|its archives]]}}
[[File:JKAlevelshot_t1_danger.png|thumb|right|200px|Data for Blenjeel]]
The '''New Republic Galactic Database''' was the main storehouse of data maintained by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and available across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

In [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]], [[Blenjeel]] was added to the database as a dangerous planet and best avoided.<ref name="JKA">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''
